title: Roadmap is a view over ordered milestones; ordering is a relation
description: Milestone order is a milestone-to-milestone ordering relation. The roadmap is a derived view over milestones in that order. No roadmap block exists.

evidence.reference: hand-authored static milestones (const MILESTONES = [...]), not derived; no milestone ordering relation; no roadmap block or lens

impact: The roadmap has no live source and milestone sequence is unrepresented.
proposed_resolution: RESOLVED at TASK-077: milestone_precedes_milestone registered (live + catalog, modeled on decision_supersedes_decision); the roadmap derives as a view over the precedes DAG (chain generalized to DAG per the user-approved plan delta — three starts, two joins over MILE-001..009); rendered/validated/loaded by the param-less context-roadmap ops; no block, no roadmap.json; the legacy machinery retired. --- Original: Register relation_type milestone_precedes_milestone (category ordering, source milestone, target milestone), modeled on the existing decision_supersedes_decision. Roadmap order is the precedes-chain: start at the milestone with no predecessor and follow precedes to the end. Render the roadmap as a view over that chain; add no block.
